SEARCH

Uses of Interface
org.bukkit.Keyed

Packages that use Keyed
Package
Description
com.destroystokyo.paper
 
io.papermc.paper.datacomponent
 
io.papermc.paper.dialog
This package contains classes and interfaces related to the dialog system in Paper.
io.papermc.paper.potion
 
io.papermc.paper.registry
 
io.papermc.paper.registry.event
This package contains events related to the Paper registry system.
io.papermc.paper.registry.set
This package contains the API for registry sets in Paper.
io.papermc.paper.registry.tag
 
io.papermc.paper.tag
 
org.bukkit
The root package of the Bukkit API, contains generalized API classes.
org.bukkit.advancement
Classes relevant to advancements.
org.bukkit.attribute
Classes relevant to attributes.
org.bukkit.block
Classes used to manipulate the voxels in a world, including special states.
org.bukkit.block.banner
Classes relevant to banner blocks.
org.bukkit.boss
Classes concerning the creation of boss bars that appear at the top of the player's screen.
org.bukkit.damage
Classes concerning damage types and sources applicable to living entities.
org.bukkit.enchantments
Classes relating to the specialized enhancements to item stacks, as part of the meta data.
org.bukkit.entity
Interfaces for non-voxel objects that can exist in a world, including all players, monsters, projectiles, etc.
org.bukkit.entity.memory
Classes concerning an entity's persistent memory.
org.bukkit.generator
Classes to facilitate world generation implementation.
org.bukkit.generator.structure
Classes to facilitate world Structure generation.
org.bukkit.inventory
Classes involved in manipulating player inventories and item interactions.
org.bukkit.inventory.meta.trim
Armor trim meta types.
org.bukkit.loot
Classes relevant to loot table manipulation and generation.
org.bukkit.map
Classes to facilitate plugin handling of map displays.
org.bukkit.potion
Classes to represent various potion properties and manipulation.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Reference<T extends Keyed>
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Methods in io.papermc.paper.registry with type parameters of type Keyed
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends Keyed>
    @NotNull Reference<T>
    Reference.create(@NotNull Registry<T> registry, @NotNull NamespacedKey key)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    <T extends Keyed>
    Registry<T>
    RegistryAccess.getRegistry(RegistryKey<T> registryKey)
    Gets the registry with the specified key.
    <T extends Keyed>
    @Nullable Registry<T>
    RegistryAccess.getRegistry(Class<T> type)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    use RegistryAccess.getRegistry(RegistryKey) with keys from RegistryKey

    RegistryKeySet<T>

    Subinterfaces of Keyed in org.bukkit
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Art
    Represents the art on a painting.
    interface 
    FeatureFlag
    This represents a Feature Flag for a FeatureFlagSetHolder.
    interface 
    Fluid
    Represents a fluid type.
    interface 
    JukeboxSong
    Represents a song which may play in a Jukebox.
    interface 
    RegionAccessor
    A RegionAccessor gives access to getting, modifying and spawning Biome, BlockState and Entity, as well as generating some basic structures.
    interface 
    Sound
    An interface of Sounds the server is able to send to players.
    interface 
    Tag<T extends Keyed>
    Represents a tag that may be defined by the server or a resource pack to group like things together.
    interface 
    World
    Represents a world, which may contain entities, chunks and blocks

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GameEvent
    Represents a generic Mojang game event.
    class 
    GameRule<T>
    GameRules dictate certain behavior within Minecraft itself

    Material
    An enum of all material IDs accepted by the official server and client

    MusicInstrument
     
    enum 
    Particle

    Statistic
    Represents a countable statistic, which is tracked by the server.

    StructureType

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <B extends Keyed>
    B
    UnsafeValues.get(RegistryKey<B> registry, NamespacedKey key)
    Deprecated.
     
    static <T extends Keyed>
    @Nullable Registry<T>
    Bukkit.getRegistry(@NotNull Class<T> tClass)
    Deprecated.
    use RegistryAccess.getRegistry(io.papermc.paper.registry.RegistryKey) with keys from RegistryKey
    <T extends Keyed>
    @Nullable Registry<T>
    Server.getRegistry(@NotNull Class<T> tClass)
    Deprecated.
    use RegistryAccess.getRegistry(io.papermc.paper.registry.RegistryKey) with keys from RegistryKey
    static <T extends Keyed>
    @Nullable Tag<T>
    Bukkit.getTag(@NotNull String registry, @NotNull NamespacedKey tag, @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
    Gets a tag which has already been defined within the server.
    <T extends Keyed>
    @Nullable Tag<T>
    Server.getTag(@NotNull String registry, @NotNull NamespacedKey tag, @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
    Gets a tag which has already been defined within the server.
    static <T extends Keyed>
    @NotNull Iterable<Tag<T>>
    Bukkit.getTags(@NotNull String registry, @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
    Gets all tags which have been defined within the server.
    <T extends Keyed>
    @NotNull Iterable<Tag<T>>
    Server.getTags(@NotNull String registry, @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
    Gets all tags which have been defined within the server.

    Description

    Cat.Type

    Chicken.Variant
    Represents the variant of a chicken.

    Represents the variant of a cow.
    static interface 
    Frog.Variant
    Represents the variant of a frog - ie its color.

    Pig.Variant
    Represents the variant of a pig.
    static interface 
    Villager.Profession
    Represents the various different Villager professions there may be.

    Villager.Type
    Represents Villager type, usually corresponding to what biome they spawn in.

    Wolf.SoundVariant
    Represents the sound variant of a wolf.
    static interface 
    Wolf.Variant
    Represents the variant of a wolf.
    static interface

  • Uses of Keyed in org.bukkit.inventory

    Subinterfaces of Keyed in org.bukkit.inventory
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ComplexRecipe
    Represents a complex recipe which has imperative server-defined behavior, eg armor dyeing.
    interface 
    ItemType
    Represents an item type.
    static interface 
    ItemType.Typed<M extends ItemMeta>
    Typed represents a subtype of ItemTypes that have a known item meta type at compile time.
    interface 
    MenuType
    Represents different kinds of views, also known as menus, which can be created and viewed by the player.
    static interface 
    MenuType.Typed<V extends InventoryView,B extends InventoryViewBuilder<V>>
    Typed represents a subtype of MenuTypes that have a known InventoryView type at compile time.
    Classes in org.bukkit.inventory that implement Keyed
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BlastingRecipe
    Represents a campfire recipe.
    class 
    CampfireRecipe
    Represents a campfire recipe.
    class 
    CookingRecipe<T extends CookingRecipe>
    Represents a cooking recipe.
    class 
    CraftingRecipe
    Represents a shaped or shapeless crafting recipe.
    class 
    FurnaceRecipe
    Represents a furnace recipe.
    class 
    ShapedRecipe
    Represents a shaped (ie normal) crafting recipe.
    class 
    ShapelessRecipe
    Represents a shapeless recipe, where the arrangement of the ingredients on the crafting grid does not matter.
    class 
    SmithingRecipe
    Represents a smithing recipe.
    class 
    SmithingTransformRecipe
    Represents a smithing transform recipe.
    class 
    SmithingTrimRecipe
    Represents a smithing trim recipe.
    class 
    SmokingRecipe
    Represents a campfire recipe.
    class 
    StonecuttingRecipe
    Represents a Stonecutting recipe.
    class 
    TransmuteRecipe
    Represents a recipe which will change the type of the input material when combined with an additional material, but preserve all custom data.

    Subinterfaces of Keyed in org.bukkit.loot
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    LootTable
    LootTables are technical files that represent what items should be in naturally generated containers, what items should be dropped when killing a mob, or what items can be fished.
    Classes in org.bukkit.loot that implement Keyed
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    LootTables
    This enum holds a list of all known LootTables offered by Mojang.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PotionEffectType
    Represents a type of potion and its effect on an entity.
    class 
    PotionEffectTypeWrapper
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    only for backwards compatibility, PotionEffectTypeWrapper is no longer used.
    enum 
    PotionType
    This enum reflects and matches each potion state that can be obtained from the Creative mode inventory
